scope.focus: KGEN Bank-related contracts and civilization references
scope.constraint: Do not infer version or deployment status from filenames alone; verify from contract declaration, source comments, authoritative docs, and address references.

read_order.role: Bank-focused machine index and conflict register
Core V7.5.2 Galactic Bank source; read only
18888 Lingxiao Deity Bank source; read only
Authoritative KGEN chain info and core contract list

version_evidence: Solidity declaration: contract KGEN_GalacticBank_V7_5_2 is Ownable
KGEN/contracts/README.md identifies Bank as Galactic Bank in the V7.5.2 core triad
galactic_bank.role: Galactic Bank — 五指山制度中樞 / treasury hub for reflux, payout, allocation, and governance operations

owner_withdrawals: withdrawToken(address token, address to, uint256 amount)

docs.role: Defines Galactic Bank as a civilization institution, not a locked vault
Defines 500Y Epoch as a civilization cycle, not a fund lock

deployment_status.evidence: KGEN/README.md documents KGEN Token, LP Pair, PinkLock, and Genesis Inscription addresses but does not document a Galactic Bank address.

lingxiao_deity_bank.name: 靈霄寶殿神明銀行
version_evidence: Header comment names KGEN_LingxiaoDeityBank_V1_0_1.sol and describes 18888｜靈霄寶殿・玉帝神明銀行（Deity Bank）
Solidity declaration: contract KGEN_LingxiaoDeityBank_V1_0_1 is OwnableLite, ReentrancyGuardLite
docs/civilization/CONTRACT_INDEX.json maps civilization 18888 to contract_name KGEN_LingxiaoDeityBank_V1_0_1 and version V1_0_1
docs/civilization/CIVILIZATION_18888_INDEX.json uses the same contract source and version mapping
lingxiao_deity_bank.role: 18888 Deity Bank — vault cap, deity threshold, pull-claim dividends, monthly payroll finalization, early withdrawal penalty split

source_rules_verified.min_deity_deposit: minDeityDepositWhole = 100,000 KGEN; setParams requires at least 100,000
source_rules_verified.payday_window: isPaydayWindowUTC() returns true when UTC day >= 5
source_rules_verified.monthly_finalize: finalizeMonthWithAmount(uint256 yyyymm, uint256 rewardAddedWei) requires owner or keeper
source_rules_verified.tax_receiver_note: Header comment says this contract can be the KGEN Token 0.1% tax receiver

deployment_status.evidence: No LingxiaoDeityBank deployed address is documented in KGEN/README.md; source has configurable token and downstream addresses but no embedded deployed address.
deployment_status.portal_displayed_address_conflict: docs/civilization/PORTAL_INDEX.json displays 18888 Bank address 0xfc522243e988a837700CaD600D6f030f5932681F, but this is not verified as the LingxiaoDeityBank deployment by KGEN/README.md or the contract source.

portal_18888_reference.portal_name: 靈霄寶殿・玉帝神明銀行
portal_18888_reference.portal_addr_note: Portal labels as Bank; may differ from LingxiaoDeityBank source-only contract in repo
archive_evidence: K線西遊記/archive/INDEX.html labels 0xfc522243e988a837700CaD600D6f030f5932681F as ADDR.BANK and drawer label Galactic Bank
K線西遊記/temples/12345/SOP/TEMPLE_12345_AI_SOP_V10_18_TRUE_LINK.md lists the same address under Galactic Bank

labels_seen: 靈霄寶殿・玉帝神明銀行

active_conflicts.summary: Portal and archive/UI references display 0xfc522243e988a837700CaD600D6f030f5932681F as Bank / Galactic Bank for 18888, while KGEN/README.md does not document any Bank deployment address and KGEN_LingxiaoDeityBank_V1_0_1.sol contains no deployed address.
active_conflicts.needed_resolution: Verify 0xfc522243e988a837700CaD600D6f030f5932681F on BscScan or deployment records and record whether it is GalacticBank V7.5.2, LingxiaoDeityBank V1.0.1, or a different Bank contract.

active_conflicts.summary: Docs use Galactic Bank as the V7.5.2 core institutional bank, while 18888 is Lingxiao Deity Bank. Portal/archive labels sometimes collapse both under Bank/Galactic Bank.
active_conflicts.needed_resolution: Keep both source identities separate until deployed bytecode/address evidence proves an equivalence.

governance.version_policy: New versions add new files; do not overwrite old civilization contracts
governance.indexing_policy: Document conflicts explicitly when filenames, declarations, docs, portal labels, or deployed addresses disagree.
